description_long: This is a lavender-colored ceramic cup with a rounded cylindrical body and a smoothly curved handle attached to one side. The exterior features a playful design with three blue water droplets and the phrase 'Drink Up' written in a stylish script on the front. The interior of the cup is white, providing a clean contrast to the vibrant exterior. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The cup's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware. There are no visible chips, cracks, or additional attachments such as a lid.
description: A lavender ceramic cup with a blue droplet design and 'Drink Up' text, featuring a white interior and a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right, blue droplet artwork, and 'Drink Up' text.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle not visible, showing the plain lavender surface and a vertical seam.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, no artwork visible, showing the cup's smooth lavender body.
description_view_3: Back view with no handle or artwork visible, just the plain lavender surface.
